  let y : Fin (2 * n) → ℝ := fun i => if h : i < n then x ⟨i, h⟩ else -x ⟨i - n, (by omega)⟩

    intro n x a ha
    let K (t : ℝ) (x y : ℝ) : ℝ := exp (-t * |x - y|)

      intro t ht
      rw [show (fun i j => a i * a j * K t (x i) (x j)) = (fun i j => a i * a j * (1 / π * ∫ u, (t / (t^2 + u^2)) * Real.cos (u * (x i - x j)))) by
        ext i j; congr; rw [Real.exp_neg, ← Real.integral_cos_cauchy ht (x i - x j)]; field_simp]

        intro u; simp [c, s, sq]; ring

  have h_sum := h_cnd y a ha
  simp only [y, a, Fin.sum_univ_two_mul, ↓reduceIte, n.nsmul_one, mul_one, mul_neg, neg_mul, neg_neg,

let f (t : ℝ) (u : ℝ) := 1 - Real.exp (-t * |u|)
  have h (t : ℝ) (ht : 0 < t) : ∑ i, ∑ j, f t (x i - x j) ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, f t (x i + x j) := by
    simp only [f, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ, Fintype.card_fin]
    rw [sub_le_sub_iff_left]
    let c (i : Fin (2 * n)) : ℝ := if i < n then 1 else -1
    let y (i : Fin (2 * n)) : ℝ := if h : i < n then x ⟨i, h⟩ else -x ⟨i - n, (Nat.sub_lt_left_of_lt_add (Nat.le_of_not_lt h) (by simpa using i.2))⟩
    have : 0 ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, c i * c j * Real.exp (-t * |y i - y j|) := by
      let k (a b : ℝ) := Real.exp (-t * |a - b|)
      have : ∃ (H : Type) (_ : InnerProductSpace ℝ H), ∃ (φ : ℝ → H), ∀ a b, k a b = ⟪φ a, φ b⟫_ℝ := by
        refine ⟨ℝ →? ℝ, inferInstance, ?_, ?_⟩
        sorry -- This is the positive-definiteness of the Laplace kernel
      rcases this with ⟨H, _, φ, hφ⟩
      rw [←inner_self_get_sum_ih' ℝ] -- Using properties of inner products
      sorry
    simpa [c, y] using this
  sorry -- The final result follows by integrating the identity for f t against t⁻³/²

let g (a : ℝ) : ℝ := √|a|
  have h_cnd : ∀ {m : ℕ} (y : Fin m → ℝ) (c : Fin m → ℝ), ∑ i, c i = 0 → ∑ i, ∑ j, c i * c j * g (y i - y j) ≤ 0 := by
    intro m y c hc
    let f (t : ℝ) : ℝ := (∑ i, c i * Real.sin (t * y i)) ^ 2 + (∑ i, c i * Real.cos (t * y i)) ^ 2
    have : ∀ t, 0 ≤ f t := fun t => add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _)
    sorry
  let m := 2 * n
  let y : Fin m → ℝ := fun i => if h : i < n then x ⟨i, h⟩ else -x ⟨i - n, by omega⟩
  let c : Fin m → ℝ := fun i => if i < n then 1 else -1
  have hc : ∑ i, c i = 0 := by
    rw [Fin.sum_univ_add_congr n]
    simp [c]
  have h_sum := h_cnd y c hc
  simp [y, c, g] at h_sum
  rw [Fin.sum_univ_add_congr n] at h_sum
  simp [y, c, g] at h_sum
  linarith

  let c : Fin (n + n) → ℝ := Fin.addCases (fun _ => 1) (fun _ => -1)
  let y : Fin (n + n) → ℝ := Fin.addCases x (-x ·)
  have := hnd _ y c (by simp [c, Fin.sum_univ_add])
  simp [c, y, Fin.sum_univ_add, Fin.addCases_left, Fin.addCases_right, d,
    Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_neg_distrib, abs_sub_comm] at this
  linarith

  · intro i t ht; exact Finset.sum_nonneg fun j ↦ div_nonneg (by positivity) (by positivity)

let f (t : ℝ) : ℝ := (∑ i, Real.sin (t * x i)) ^ 2
  have hf (t : ℝ) : 0 ≤ f t := sq_nonneg _
  have h_id (a : ℝ) : √|a| = (2 * Real.sqrt Real.pi)⁻¹ * ∫ t in Set.Ioi 0, (1 - Real.cos (t * a)) / t ^ (3 / 2 : ℝ) := by

    neg_zero, zero_sub, neg_neg, ← Finset.sum_mul, ← f, mul_assoc, mul_nonneg (by norm_num) (hf t)],
    by positivity⟩

  let y : Fin n ⊕ Fin n → ℝ := Sum.elim x (-x)

let f (a : ℝ) : ℝ := √|a|
  have h_int (a : ℝ) : f a = (1 / (2 * Real.gamma (3 / 2))) * ∫ t in Set.Ioi 0, (1 - Real.exp (-t * |a|)) * t⁻¹ ^ (3 / 2) := sorry
  have h_pd (t : ℝ) (ht : 0 < t) : ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.exp (-t * |x i - x j|) ≥ ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.exp (-t * |x i + x j|) := by
    let y (k : Fin (2 * n)) : ℝ := if h : k < n then x ⟨k, h⟩ else -x ⟨k - n, Nat.sub_lt_left_of_lt_add (Nat.not_lt.mp h) k.is_lt⟩
    let c (k : Fin (2 * n)) : ℝ := if k < n then 1 else -1
    have h_sum_c : ∑ k, c k = 0 := by
      rw [Finset.sum_fin_eq_sum_range, Nat.sum_range_succ__if_cond]
      simp [Finset.filter_range_lt, Nat.min_eq_left]
    have h_pd_exp : 0 ≤ ∑ k, ∑ l, c k * c l * Real.exp (-t * |y k - y l|) := by
      exact Real.exp_abs_neg_integral_ge_zero t y c
    have : ∑ k, ∑ l, c k * c l * Real.exp (-t * |y k - y l|) = 2 * (∑ i, ∑ j, Real.exp (-t * |x i - x j|) - ∑ i, ∑ j, Real.exp (-t * |x i + x j|)) := by
      sorry
    linarith
  have : ∑ i, ∑ j, (f (x i + x j) - f (x i - x j)) = (1 / (2 * Real.gamma (3 / 2))) * ∫ t in Set.Ioi 0, (∑ i, ∑ j, (Real.exp (-t * |x i - x j|) - Real.exp (-t * |x i + x j|))) * t⁻¹ ^ (3 / 2) := by
    sorry
  have h_ge_zero : 0 ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, (f (x i + x j) - f (x i - x j)) := by
    apply MeasureTheory.integral_nonneg_of_forall
    intro t
    by_cases ht : t ∈ Set.Ioi 0
    · exact mul_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr (h_pd t ht)) (by positivity)
    · simp
  exact sub_nonneg.mp h_ge_zero

  let w : Fin (n + n) → ℝ := Fin.addCases (1 : Fin n → ℝ) (-1 : Fin n → ℝ)

  let y : Fin (2 * n) → ℝ := fun i => if h : i < n then x ⟨i, h⟩ else -x ⟨i - n, (by omega)⟩
  let c : Fin (2 * n) → ℝ := fun i => if i < n then 1 else -1

    · exact Real.zero_lt_one_half
    · exact Real.one_half_le_one
  have h_expand : ∑ i, ∑ j, c i * c j * f (y i - y j) = 2 * (∑ i, ∑ j, f (x i - x j) - ∑ i, ∑ j, f (x i + x j)) := by
    simp_rw [Finset.sum_reindex_hfintype (Fin.mul_equiv 2 n).symm]
    simp_rw [c, y, Fin.sum_univ_two_mul, Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
    simp only [f, abs_sub_comm, sub_neg_eq_add, neg_sub_neg, abs_neg, neg_sub_rev, mul_one, mul_neg,
      mul_minus_one, neg_mul, neg_neg, ← mul_two, Fin.coe_cast_succ, Fin.coe_nat_add, Fin.coe_fin_one,
      add_zero, if_true, if_false, Fin.is_lt, add_tsub_cancel_left]
    ring
  linarith [h_neg, h_expand]

let f (t : ℝ) := (∑ i, Real.sin (t * x i)) ^ 2
  have hf t : 0 ≤ f t := sq_nonneg _
  have h (a : ℝ) : √|a| = (∫ t in Set.Ioi 0, (1 - Real.cos (t * a)) / (t * Real.sqrt t)) * (Real.sqrt 2 / Real.pi) := sorry
  simp_rw [h, ← Finset.sum_mul, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
  refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (MeasureTheory.integral_nonneg (fun t ↦ ?_)) (by positivity)
  rw [Finset.sum_comm, ← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
  simp_rw [← Real.cos_sub, ← Real.cos_add, Real.cos_sub_cos]
  simp_rw [mul_comm (t := 2), ← Real.mul_sin_left, ← Finset.mul_sum, ← Finset.sum_mul, ← f, mul_div_assoc]
  exact div_nonneg (mul_nonneg (by norm_num) (hf _)) (by positivity)

letI : Metric.NegativeType (Metric.PowDist ℝ (1 / 2 : ℝ)) :=
    Metric.negativeType_pow_dist ℝ (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
  have h := Metric.NegativeType.sum_dist_sum_dist_le_two_sum_dist (X := Metric.PowDist ℝ (1 / 2 : ℝ)) x (fun i ↦ -x i)
  simp_rw [dist, Real.dist_eq, ← Real.sqrt_eq_rpow, sub_neg_eq_add, neg_sub_neg, abs_sub_comm] at h ⊢
  linarith

end IMO2021P2

let f (t : ℝ) (y : ℝ) := 1 - Real.cos (t * y)
  have h (y : ℝ) : √|y| = (1 / (Real.sqrt 2 * Real.Gamma (3 / 4))) * ∫ t in Set.Ioi 0, f (Real.sqrt t) y / t ^ (5 / 4) := sorry
  simp_rw [h]
  rw [← Finset.sum_comm, ← Finset.sum_comm (j := _)]
  simp_rw [← Filter.Real.integral_finset_sum]
  refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (set_integral_mono (by sorry) (by sorry) (λ t ht ↦ ?_)) (by sorry)
  simp_rw [f, Real.cos_sub_cos, mul_comm (t := 2)]
  simp_rw [← Finset.sum_mul, ← Finset.mul_sum]
  rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  simp_rw [← Finset.sum_mul, ← Finset.mul_sum]
  exact mul_nonneg (by norm_num) (pow_two_nonneg _)

let c : Fin n ⊕ Fin n → ℝ := Sum.elim (fun _ => 1) (fun _ => -1)
  let y : Fin n ⊕ Fin n → ℝ := Sum.elim x (-x)
  have h_neg : IsNegativeType ℝ (fun a b => √|a - b|) := by
    have h := is_negative_type_dist (E := ℝ)
    have h_p := h.rpow (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1 / 2) (by norm_num : (1 / 2 : ℝ) ≤ 1)
    simp_rw [sqrt_eq_rpow]
    exact h_p
  have h_sum_c : ∑ i, c i = 0 := by simp
  have h := h_neg (Fin n ⊕ Fin n) c y h_sum_c
  simp only [Fintype.sum_sum_type, Sum.elim_sum_elim, mul_one, one_mul, neg_mul, mul_neg,
    neg_mul_neg, sum_neg_distrib, neg_sub_neg, abs_neg, sub_neg_eq_add, neg_sub_eq_add_neg,
    abs_sub_comm, add_comm] at h
  linarith
